name: Patty Garcia
data_note: Limited public information available. Check your county clerk's office or the Illinois State Board of Elections for filing info.
bio: Patty Garcia holds a PhD from the University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign and served as Chief of Staff to Congressman Jesus 'Chuy' Garcia (IL-04). She is the Democratic nominee in the IL-04 primary — running uncontested — and is considered the institutional heir to Chuy Garcia's progressive legacy in the heavily Latino southwest Chicago district. (Source: Ballotpedia; ILSOS filing confirmed; Citizens Action Illinois endorsement)
prior_office: Chief of Staff to Rep. Jesus 'Chuy' Garcia (IL-04)

policy_platform.position: Defend immigrant families; abolish ICE; end abusive enforcement. Strong sanctuary policy advocate.
Lower costs, higher wages; tax corporations and the wealthy; union jobs; oppose corporate giveaways.
Fully fund public schools; oppose privatization.
Peace, not endless war. Diplomacy over bombs. Human rights in foreign policy. Oppose military occupation.
